steps.title: Identify the striking pattern from 1973 to 2013
steps.content: Both the House (dropping from roughly 73% to 17%) and Senate (dropping from roughly 78% to 16%) display a steep, dramatic decline across this 40-year span. This sharp downward movement in both lines is the graph's most defining feature.

steps.title: Match the pattern to the choices
steps.content: C correctly identifies the substantial decrease in both houses from 1973 to 2013 that the graph's downward slopes demonstrate, while the other choices either misread the House-Senate comparison, extend the majority timeline incorrectly, or contradict the visible declines. This matches choice C — C is correct.
